speaker: speaker1
text: I need help using the washer and dryer .

speaker: speaker2
text: Tell me what the problem is .

speaker: speaker1
text: I can't figure out how to turn them on .

speaker: speaker1
text: I didn't know I needed change .

speaker: speaker2
text: The washer costs 50 cents and the dryer costs a dollar .

speaker: speaker1
text: Where do I put the change ?

speaker: speaker2
text: The quarters go into the slot . You have to push the slot in , and the machine will turn on .

speaker: speaker1
text: Is that everything that I have to do ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I appreciate you helping me with this .

speaker: speaker2
text: If you need anything else , just let me know .
